name: Config Bootstrap
description: Clones a configuration repository from GitHub and executes its install.sh script to bootstrap the dev container environment.

CONFIG_REPO.description: GitHub repository URL to clone (e.g., https://github.com/user/my-config-repo.git). Required.

CONFIG_REPO_BRANCH.description: Branch or tag to checkout from the config repository.

CONFIG_REPO_DIR.description: Local directory to clone the config repository into.
